heroSubtitle: AI-powered support for financial services. Get instant answers on accounts, billing, claims, and compliance — without the wait.
howItWorksNote: Click the chat widget in the bottom right to try it out.

questions.title: Consumer Support
items: I was charged twice for the same transaction. How do I request a refund, and how long will it take to get my money back?
There's a charge on my account I don't recognize. What steps should I take to dispute it?
The bank is asking me to verify my identity before completing a payment. Why is this happening, and what do I need to do?
How do I update my saved card or payment method on my account?
I want to cancel my subscription. Will I lose access immediately, and what happens to my billing history?

questions.title: Business & Operations
items: How does Maple handle PCI-DSS compliance, and what are my responsibilities as a merchant?
How do I manage user roles and permissions for my team in the Dashboard?
What happens when a subscription payment fails? How do you handle recovery?
How do I verify my business identity to enable live payments and payouts?
How can I monitor my payment operations and get notified about key events like failed payouts or disputes?

problems.title: Account Access Gridlock
problems.description: Locked accounts, forgotten passwords, and expired sessions generate the highest volume of support contacts in financial services. Customers hit dead ends when credentials don't match or multi-factor authentication fails — and every failed login is a potential churn event.
problems.stat: Tier-1 ticket volume reduced by 60%+ in 90 days

problems.title: Claims & Dispute Maze
problems.description: Policyholders and banking customers struggle to file claims, locate the right department, and track resolution status. Multi-step processes lead to abandonment and repeat contacts — each handoff eroding trust and increasing cost.

problems.title: Billing & Payment Confusion
problems.description: Users can't find where to make a payment, don't understand a charge on their statement, or need to update a funding source. Support teams field the same billing questions daily — questions that have known answers but no scalable delivery mechanism.
problems.stat: Billing inbound chat volume reduced by 50%+

problems.title: Onboarding Abandonment
problems.description: New customers drop off during enrollment when asked for identity verification, funding methods, or document uploads they didn't expect. Each abandoned application costs acquisition spend — and the customer is lost before they've even started.

problems.title: Compliance Documentation Sprawl
problems.description: Internal teams spend hours locating the right policy document, audit checklist, or regulatory FAQ across scattered wikis and shared drives. Slow answers hurt regulators and customers alike — and in financial services, a delayed compliance response carries real risk.

problems.title: Integration & Permissions Bottlenecks
problems.description: IT administrators manually provision user roles, configure API connections, and troubleshoot data-sync failures between core banking, CRM, and payment platforms. Every delay cascades downstream — and 70% of escalations trace back to configuration issues that should never have reached a human.
